statement: In every magma, Equation 181 (`x = (y * y) * (y * z)`) implies Equation 886 (`x = y * ((x * y) * (z * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0447
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y y) (op y z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op x y) (op z y)))
